headline: DD Expands Rural Water Infrastructure in Kenya Project With ChildFund
summary: DuPont expands access to clean water in Kenya, deploying advanced filtration technology to serve 20,000 people in underserved communities in Baringo County.

raw.headline: DD Expands Rural Water Infrastructure in Kenya Project With ChildFund
raw.summary: DuPont expands access to clean water in Kenya, deploying advanced filtration technology to serve 20,000 people in underserved communities in Baringo County.
